rows.label: tlk45370151_04_msg0001
rows.name:
We may have avoided war with
Invidia, but the underlying
issues have not been solved.

rows.label: tlk45370151_04_msg0002
rows.name:
It's an undeniable fact that
after Temperantia, our rift
with Invidia has grown.

rows.label: tlk45370151_04_msg0003
rows.name:
At this rate, when the Superbia
Divine Beast's life reaches its
end, Gula will be our only refuge...

rows.label: tlk45370151_04_msg0004
rows.name:
I would like to avoid resorting to war
as much as anyone, but I am failing
to envision a peaceful solution...
